item.title: I don't need the space but I never use these.
item.dc:creator: jerbern1

item.title: When?
item.description:
So when does it get to be about me.
Everyday is about others.
So when does it get to be about me.
Spend the days providing.
So when does it get to be about us.
I never see you. I never see them.
The ones provided for.
I'm not here, always there.
I'm falling apart.
I'll wait, but when does it get to be about me?
item.dc:creator: infallibledegenerate

item.title: Fuck billionaires
item.description: It's not a full blown strike outside of Sweden yet, but I sure hope it's coming. Everyone deserves a safe and fair employment. https://time.com/6342620/swedish-danish-unions-tesla-fight/ https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-12-06/tesla-suffers-fresh-legal-setback-in-sweden-over-license-plates

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greeting, online friends
it just makes sense
it's very important
the enthusiasm is permeating through the screen
we've all done that at least once
from Father of the Bride part 2
mmm hmm
you don't say??
i certainly wouldn't want to fight one
what a tiny woman... science, amirite??
yes
if they see you putting effort into concealing something they will try harder to get it
hee hoo, big hat
i guess
i don't know
naked time
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: aerrorfree

item.title: No more wars
item.description: "Let me say a few words to express my concerns about the $106 billion emergency foreign aid supplemental bill that we may soon be considering. There are pieces of this bill I strongly support, but in its present form I do not think it serves the interests of the American people. Let me explain why. First, while I strongly support Ukraine’s valiant efforts to defend itself against Putin’s invasion, and Israel’s need to defend itself against incoming rocket and missile attacks, I am deeply concerned that this legislation has no investments to address the needs of working families in the United States – 60 percent of whom are living paycheck to paycheck. Let’s be clear: it is not only foreign countries that face emergencies. We face enormous emergencies in this country right now in terms of child care, primary health care, housing, and much more. The American people do not want us to continue to ignore these issues. Second, at a time when Congress will likely soon pass a $900 billion defense bill, this supplemental bill includes tens of billions that should be covered as part of the base defense budget and handled through normal appropriations, not allocated as “emergency” spending. We can save tens of billions of dollars in this bill and dedicate that money to some of the enormous domestic crises we face. Third, at a time when some 16,000 Palestinians have been killed in the last two months, two thirds of whom are women and children, and tens of thousands more injured. At a time when 1.8 million people have been displaced from their homes and are struggling every day to get the food, water, medical supplies, and fuel they need to survive. At a time when over 250 people have been killed in the West Bank since October 7th, and more than a thousand Palestinians have been driven off their land there. No, I do not think we should be appropriating $10.1 billion for the right-wing, extremist Netanyahu government to continue its current military approach. What the Netanyahu government is doing is immoral, it is in violation of international law, and the United States should not be complicit in those actions. We are all clear that Hamas, a corrupt terrorist organization, began this war with their barbaric attack against Israel on October 7. Given that reality, Israel has a right to defend itself. It does not, however, have the right to wage all-out war against innocent men, women, and children who had nothing to do with the Hamas attack. Therefore, I believe it is appropriate to support defensive systems that will protect Israeli civilians against incoming missile and rockets attacks, but I believe that it would be absolutely irresponsible to provide an additional $10.1 billion in unconditional military aid that will allow the Netanyahu government to continue its current offensive military approach. That approach has included indiscriminate bombing that has killed nearly 16,000 people, most of whom are civilians. Let me repeat that figure and put it into context: 16,000 Palestinians have been killed in Gaza since October 7th, two-thirds of whom are women and children. Thousands more are missing under the rubble. 16,000 in a little less than two months. In Ukraine, meanwhile, which has seen the most intense fighting in Europe since the Second World War, according to the UN, at least 10,000 civilians have been killed since Russia’s unprovoked full-scale invasion in February 2022. 10,000 in a little less than two years. That’s right, according to the UN, more civilians have been killed in two months in Gaza than in almost two years in Ukraine. Israel’s indiscriminate approach is deeply offensive to most Americans, is in violation of U.S. and international law, and undermines the prospects for lasting peace and security. Israel must dramatically change its approach to minimize civilian harm and lay out a wider political process that can secure lasting peace. That must include: a guarantee that displaced Palestinians will have the absolute right to return to their homes as Gaza rebuilds; no long-term occupation or blockade of Gaza; an end to the killings of Palestinians in the West Bank and a freeze on new settlements there; and a commitment to broad peace talks to advance a new two-state solution in the wake of this war. M. President, the Biden administration has, appropriately, been trying to get the Israelis to be more targeted in their approach, but there is little evidence that it has succeeded. Just today airstrikes hit two UN schools housing displaced people. More than 900 people have been killed since Friday. Israeli evacuation orders are delivered with little notice to people with no electricity and limited communications service, most of whom have already been displaced and lack basic necessities. And even then, Israel sometimes bombs areas people have been told are safe. How, then, does giving Netanyahu another $10 billion with no strings attached help advance the critical policy goal of the United States to protect civilians and allow for a lasting peace? The U.S. must use its substantial leverage to accomplish this, and any additional military aid to Israel must have conditions attached to secure the necessary changes in policy. We cannot be complicit in the current Israeli approach." December 4, 2023 Source: https://www.sanders.senate.gov/press-releases/prepared-remarks-sanders-expresses-concerns-about-foreign-aid-supplemental-bill/

item.title: I want a cool painting or drawing, and I've never tried getting anything to the front page before. Here we go.
item.description: Front page edit: WE GOT THERE! Thanks for your help, everybody, and hopefully I'll be back with a cool picture to show off for all our hard work.
item.dc:creator: Righteousdew

item.title: We don't understand
item.description:
My husband left. 3 weeks ago yesterday. I don't really understand. The dogs are being quite clingy.
They don't understand either. Why would they? If I don't, how could I explain?
We are sad. We are so sad.
He took the pictures of the walls. He went through the records. It's so empty. And quiet. And lonely. There is a gaping hole in our home.
Well that was not the most flattering picture.
So we're hanging out in the sofa. I'm drinking small bottles of wine and adding to my dehydration by crying. The furred ones keep me company. I assume they're afraid I'll leave too. They don't understand where he is. I don't understand why. All of our hearts are broken.
item.dc:creator: elinveronicap

item.title: Some jolly game inspiration
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/2kQbePC4

item.title: Wholesome GIF dump to improve your Thursday :)
item.description:
1. Her name is 曦曦鱼SAKANA.
2. Here is how it looks side by side! You can find here channel on YouTube for more of here work!
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted the game on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))

item.title: Life-long boy scout assaults parent of a slain uvalde student when she attempts to retrieve her son to participate in a walkout.
item.description: Source: https://old.reddit.com/r/PublicFreakout/comments/18c7mo3/a_parent_of_a_slain_uvalde_student_is_manhandled/ Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO
item.dc:creator: BlasphemousJones

item.title: The judge asked him where he got his definition.
item.description: He claimed that the judge, who just cited Webster's Third International Dictionary, was also making up definitions. Gessler also claimed that January 6th was a riot because they didn't deploy firearms. Justice William Hood, another Colorado Supreme Court judge, said that "Around 170 police officers were injured and that `there were a lot of makeshift weapons that did a lot of damage.'" They had firearms. I am just glad they didn't use them. https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-lawyer-admits-he-making-it-1850307
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: A copy in every school library
item.description: The teacher is Katie Rinderle and you can donate to support her: https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-katie-rinderle Get the book: https://larrikinhouse.com.au/products/my-shadow-is-purple Source: https://www.cnn.com/2023/08/16/us/georgia-teacher-gender-identity-book-termination-vote/index.html Update: Thanks to everyone who donated to the teacher's fundraiser! We raised over $500 so far.
